name: localvectordb
description: Search and manage local SQLite + FAISS vector databases directly inside Claude.
long_description: LocalVectorDB's built-in MCP server, packaged for one-click install. Exposes your local document-first vector databases (SQLite + FAISS with FTS5 keyword search) to Claude: list databases and inspect their schema, run vector / keyword / hybrid search, filter documents by metadata, fetch documents, and check existence. Starts in read-only mode by default; switch to read-write to also create databases, upsert / update / delete documents, and evolve metadata schemas. Point it at a folder of databases and Claude can retrieve and reason over your own indexed content.

databases_root.title: Databases directory
databases_root.description: Folder containing your LocalVectorDB databases (each database is a subfolder). Databases are created here in read-write mode.

mode.title: Server mode
mode.description: Use 'read-only' to expose search/read tools only, or 'read-write' to also allow creating and modifying databases.
